content: धर्मः किम् is not explicitly defined in the provided context. However, based on the text, it can be inferred that material piety and sin, which are related to धर्मः, cannot exist within My unalloyed devotees [1]. The context focuses on the concept of pure devotion and its relationship with the Supreme Lord, rather than providing a direct definition of धर्मः. I don't know the exact definition of धर्मः as it is not explicitly stated in the given context.
